SEARCH
Package eu.algites.lib.common.version

Enum Class AInBuiltinVersionScheme

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<AInBuiltinVersionScheme>
eu.algites.lib.common.version.AInBuiltinVersionScheme
All Implemented Interfaces:
eu.algites.lib.common.enums.AIiEnumItem, eu.algites.lib.common.enums.uiddata.AIiUidEnumData<AIiVersionSchemeDataUidRecord,eu.algites.lib.common.enums.uiddata.AInUidEnumDataOrigin,AIiVersionSchemeDataType>, eu.algites.lib.common.enums.uiddata.AIiUidEnumDataRecord, AIiVersionScheme, AIiVersionSchemeData, AIiVersionSchemeDataUidRecord, Serializable, Comparable<AInBuiltinVersionScheme>, Constable
public enum AInBuiltinVersionScheme extends Enum<AInBuiltinVersionScheme> implements AIiVersionSchemeData

Title: AInBuiltinVersionScheme

Description: Common built-in version schemes defining how version precedence is computed and how the version string is structurally interpreted (build delimiter/order) and formatted.

A version scheme is a composite of:

  • A AIiVersionComparator used for precedence comparisons.
  • A AIiVersionStructure defining how the textual form is structurally interpreted (e.g. build delimiter, whether version comes before build, build comparison policy).
  • A AIiVersionFormat defining how the version is formatted back to text (e.g. whether build metadata is emitted, omitted or mapped).

Built-in items are identified by their schemeCode() only. Structure/format are not part of the UID, so the config can continue using the scheme UID without needing separate UIDs for structure/format.

Date:
26.01.26

  • Enum Constant Details

    • MAVEN_DEFAULT

      public static final AInBuiltinVersionScheme MAVEN_DEFAULT
      Practical Maven/Gradle-friendly ordering, tolerant to common patterns.

    • MAVEN_BUILD_METADATA_IGNORED

      public static final AInBuiltinVersionScheme MAVEN_BUILD_METADATA_IGNORED

    • SEMVER_DEFAULT

      public static final AInBuiltinVersionScheme SEMVER_DEFAULT
      Semantic Versioning precedence. Build metadata after '+' is ignored for precedence comparisons but can be emitted in formatted output.

    • SEMVER_BUILD_FIRST

      public static final AInBuiltinVersionScheme SEMVER_BUILD_FIRST

    • SEMVER_BUILD_ORDERED

      public static final AInBuiltinVersionScheme SEMVER_BUILD_ORDERED

    • CALVER_DEFAULT

      public static final AInBuiltinVersionScheme CALVER_DEFAULT
      Example calendar-versioning comparator.

      public static AInBuiltinVersionScheme getByPropsOrThrow(eu.algites.lib.common.enums.uiddata.AInUidEnumDataOrigin aOrigin, String aNamespace, String aSchemeCode) throws IllegalArgumentException
